---
id: revoke-encrypted-portal-links
title: "Revoke encrypted portal links"
description: "Revokes all active encrypted portal links. New links are generated on the next customer retrieval. Use this endpoint when a link may have been leaked or sent to the wrong customer, as the links can lead to sensitive information."
sidebar_label: "Revoke encrypted portal links"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/proabono-api-live
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Revoke encrypted portal links"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Customer/LinksRevokation"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Revokes all active encrypted portal links. New links are generated on the next customer retrieval. Use this endpoint when a link may have been leaked or sent to the wrong customer, as the links can lead to sensitive information.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
